summary: All 4 bug fixes verified successfully: (1) Thank You Card uses correct 'thankyou' key (not 'thank_you'), (2) Autofill CSS forces white text (-webkit-text-fill-color: #FFFFFF), (3) iPhone-style dialer with letter labels under buttons, green call button, conditional backspace, (4) No changes needed for Add Contact form

thank_you_card_key_fix.details: CARD_TYPES array uses key 'thankyou' (line 54) which matches TYPE_META in create-card.tsx. URL navigation confirms type=thankyou parameter.

autofill_css_white_text.details: Global CSS injects autofill rules: -webkit-box-shadow: 0 0 0px 1000px #1C1C1E inset, -webkit-text-fill-color: #FFFFFF. Verified via DOM inspection.

dialer_letter_labels.details: DIAL_KEYS array includes letter labels: ABC(2), DEF(3), GHI(4), JKL(5), MNO(6), PQRS(7), TUV(8), WXYZ(9), +(0). All 8 letter labels verified present.

dialer_iphone_style_buttons.details: Buttons are 80x80px circles (width: 80, height: 80, borderRadius: 40) matching iPhone dialer style.

dialer_green_call_button.details: Call button has backgroundColor: '#34C759' (green), centered in bottom row, 80x80px round button with call icon.

dialer_conditional_backspace.details: Backspace button (backspace-outline icon) only renders when phoneNumber has content. Positioned to right of call button.

dialer_matching_contacts.details: matchingContacts useMemo filters contacts when phoneNumber.length >= 3, shows up to 3 matching contacts.

dialer_phone_number_formatting.details: formatDisplay function formats phone as (XXX) XXX-XXXX pattern.

backend_login_api.details: Login with forest@imosapp.com / Admin123! returns valid token and user object.

critical_code_review_comments: Dialer is a hidden tab (href: null in _layout.tsx) - accessible via URL /dialer but not shown in bottom navigation bar. This is intentional design.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes verified: (1) Thank You Card key changed from thank_you to thankyou, (2) Autofill CSS has white text and dark background, (3) iPhone-style dialer implemented with letter labels/backspace/matching contacts/green call button, (4) Add Contact form unchanged except for autofill fix. The dialer tab is hidden but accessible at /dialer URL.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - personal SMS uses native sms: protocol
